item.author: Antonio Gutierrez (iamdesvelao@gmail.com)

item.title: Roshan, new home!
item.description:
Roshan, a Dota 2 Discord bot, got a new home after a long time. New interactions update v0.4.0-alpha1 is available in the development server.

]]>
item.author: Antonio Gutierrez (iamdesvelao@gmail.com)
